source_jobs.title: Founding Channel Lead
source_jobs.description:
Founding Channel Lead (New York)


WHY WE'RE HIRING

Tracebit is helping some of the world's best security teams at Snyk, Docker, Riot Games and many more to 'assume breach' at scale. Tracebit detects intrusions in cloud environments using canaries - decoy assets deployed to deceive attackers.



We're at a massive inflection point and there has never been a more exciting time to join us:

 - We have just raised a $20m Series A https://tracebit.com/blog/series-a, led by FirstMark and joined by Accel, MMC Ventures, Tapestry VC and CCL.

 - We 5x’d ARR last year and have grown from 5 people to 26 in 18 months.

 - We are one of the most exciting startups to be part of in cyber, have seen some great feedback from the market and are ready for explosive growth.

 - Regularly featured on top startup lists from industry veterans... Creandum's Euro Seed top 50 list https://euroseed50.com/, Notion's Cloud Top 100 https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/613b85712c9672dcafb125ed/67ee997d510af7304efdaecc_NOTION_cloud_challengers_report_2025_V18.pdf, AlbionVC's NHI Breakdown https://albion.vc/spotlight/perspectives/a-new-era-of-secure-identity-management/, MMC's Proactive Security Analysis https://mmc.vc/research/proactive-security-bringing-the-attackers-perspective/, Accel's Euroscape Top Startups https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6643a08d305ab77f8c7566b6/670f22a19ea69a94f9710c1a_16%20October%20-%20Accel%202024%20Euroscape.pdf, Sifted's 2025 London Startups To Watch https://sifted.eu/articles/london-based-startups-to-watch, etc.

 - We partner with companies like Docker https://tracebit.com/customer/docker, Synthesia https://tracebit.com/customer/synthesia, Zepz, Compass and Snyk.

 - Our research https://www.techradar.com/pro/security/google-gemini-security-flaw-could-have-let-anyone-access-systems-or-run-code has recently helped fix a P1 security flaw in Google's Gemini CLI.



We have strong traction in the US (80% of our customer base and forward-looking business). We've done this with a small team based in London. We've hit product-market fit and it's time to accelerate our growth by building our US presence in New York.



Channel is a genuine growth lever for us. We've closed partner-influenced deals with MSSPs and VARs, and we're seeing more demand come through that motion. But it's nascent, there's no program, no infrastructure, and no playbook. This is a ground-up opportunity.



We're looking for a sharp, commercially-minded person to own this. You'll report directly to our CEO and work alongside our Director of Sales to turn early traction into a repeatable channel motion.




WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR

We're open on background. If you've built a partner program before, great. If you're a strong commercial generalist who's excited to own something from scratch, that works too. What matters:



 - You're commercially sharp. You’re a strategic thinker who can design joint GTM motions and translate value into business outcomes.

 - You’ll create a playbook that’s right for Tracebit. We’ve seen early traction from partners but haven’t built a formal program yet. You’ll dig into what’s working, experiment with new motions, and build a partnerships strategy that fits our product and buyer, not adhere to a playbook from your last company.

 - You're credible with technical buyers. Comfortable in conversations with security professionals and MSSPs. You'll need to learn the product quickly and represent it credibly.

 - You're organized and data-driven. You'll be tracking pipeline, partner performance, and deal attribution from day one. You need to be rigorous about what's working and honest when it isn't.

 - You've got good judgment and high standards. Tracebit's brand matters. We're selling to elite security teams. You'll be representing us to partners externally, and we need someone who takes that seriously.




ABOUT THE ROLE

You'll own everything channel. That means building the program, managing relationships, driving pipeline, and wor

source_jobs.title: Founding Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
Tracebit is helping some of the world’s best security teams at Snyk, Docker, Riot Games and many more to ‘assume breach’ at scale. Tracebit detects intrusions in cloud environments using canaries - decoy assets deployed to deceive attackers.

We're at a massive inflection point and there has never been a more exciting time to join us:

 - We have just raised a $20m Series A https://tracebit.com/blog/series-a, led by FirstMark and joined by Accel, MMC Ventures, Tapestry VC and CCL.

 - We are growing very quickly (we doubled ARR last quarter and will triple this year), having recently closed some incredible customers that we can’t disclose publicly!

 - We are one of the most exciting startups to be part of in the UK, have seen some great feedback from the market and are ready for explosive growth.

 - Regularly featured on top startup lists from industry veterans… Creandum’s Euro Seed top 50 list https://euroseed50.com/, Sifted’s 2025 London Startups To Watch https://sifted.eu/articles/london-based-startups-to-watch, Notions Cloud Top 100 https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/613b85712c9672dcafb125ed/67ee997d510af7304efdaecc_NOTION_cloud_challengers_report_2025_V18.pdf, AlbionVC’s NHI Breakdown https://albion.vc/spotlight/perspectives/a-new-era-of-secure-identity-management/, MMCs Proactive Security Analysis https://mmc.vc/research/proactive-security-bringing-the-attackers-perspective/, Accel’s Euroscape Top Startups 2024 https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6643a08d305ab77f8c7566b6/670f22a19ea69a94f9710c1a_16%20October%20-%20Accel%202024%20Euroscape.pdf, etc.

 - Our research https://www.techradar.com/pro/security/google-gemini-security-flaw-could-have-let-anyone-access-systems-or-run-code has recently helped fix a P1 security flaw in Google’s Gemini CLI.

 - We're Seed stage, and have grown the company from 2 to 14 people in 18 months,, with plans to triple this in the coming year.

We have strong traction in the US (80% of our customer base and forward-looking business). We've done this with a small team based in London. We've hit product-market fit and it's time to accelerate our growth by building our US sales team in New York.

Therefore, we are searching for a highly driven, emotionally intelligent and energetic individual to join Tracebit to help build our GTM practice from the ground up.

You will report to Rob https://www.linkedin.com/in/robert-thurtell-5b6152112/?originalSubdomain=uk, our Director of Sales, who previously spent 5 years at Snyk as an early employee during a hyper-growth period from $18M to $300M ARR and 200 to 1,200 employees. You will also work closely with Tracebit's Co-Founders, CEO https://www.linkedin.com/in/andy-m-smith/ and CTO https://www.linkedin.com/in/sam-j-cox/, who were both early employees at Tessian which was sold to Proofpoint in 2023.

This is a unique opportunity to join an early-stage, high-growth cybersecurity company, where you'll have real influence on our business growth with the opportunity to expedite your career as Tracebit grows.




ABOUT THE ROLE:

As our first US-based Account Executives, you'll be instrumental in building our US GTM engine. You'll work closely with our London-based Founding Sales Lead to establish repeatable sales processes while closing your own deals.

What you'll do:

 - Close deals with some of the most exciting logos globally. You will own the full sales cycle from discovery through to contract signature on key deals into the $50-100k + ARR range, working across SMB and Mid-Market companies.

 - Work both inbound and outbound opportunities. Convert warm inbound leads from our growing user base and product-led motion. Run targeted outbound campaigns into accounts that match our ICP. You’ll own your own business.

 - Help build our sales playbook. We have GTM motions in place, but we want you to help re-write them. You will help to design a sales function - refining our discovery questions, demo flow, objection handling, and closing tactics.

 - Partner w

source_jobs.title: Founding Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Our product helps security teams quickly and accurately detect intrusions in their cloud environment using canaries - decoy tripwires deployed to deceive attackers.


We're at a massive inflection point and this is a hugely exciting time to join the company:

 - We've just raised a $20m Series A https://tracebit.com/blog/series-a led by FirstMark with Accel, MMC, Tapestry and CCL.

 - We doubled ARR last quarter, work with companies like Riot Games, Docker and Snyk, and have grown from 5 people to 26 in 18 months.

 - Our research https://www.techradar.com/pro/security/google-gemini-security-flaw-could-have-let-anyone-access-systems-or-run-code recently helped fix a P1 security flaw in Google's Gemini CLI.
   

We’re looking for someone who…

 - Cares deeply about producing high quality work and is ready to dig into the details but is savvy in making the correct tradeoffs on pace vs. quality.

 - Has spent at least a few years shipping software at some degree of scale and/or criticality.

 - Ideally at a Product focused company and/or working with at least 1 of the public clouds (AWS, Azure, GCP, etc.)

 - Is excited by the pace and rate of change that is inevitable in any successful, early stage startup.

 - Gets their energy from getting things done and in the hands of customers but is also here to have fun along the way!

If you don’t fit this bill exactly but think you could make a difference here - please, apply!

Role

Reporting to Niall https://www.linkedin.com/in/niall-gallagher/, our Engineering Lead, and with significant exposure to our CTO and Co-Founder, Sam https://www.linkedin.com/in/sam-j-cox/, you’ll join a team of other awesome engineers looking to make their mark on the world.

This includes:

 - Working face to face with both founders, the whole engineering team and our customers and prospects to build a delightful product that solves real problems.

 - Working across the stack, mostly in C# on .NET Core 10 (here's why https://tracebit.com/blog/why-tracebit-is-written-in-c-sharp), but also Terraform and building out our frontend in HTMX.

 - All the good practices you’d expect from technical co-founders who’ve done this before (CD, Infrastructure as code, simple but scalable and powerful architecture)

 - We’re a small, tight team with demanding customers so expect to be shipping every day with very little bureaucracy.

 - We actively encourage AI-assisted development and give every engineer full access to tools like Claude and Codex.

 - We’re based in a Central London office and work here 5 days a week (and everyone we hire will too).


FAQS

How is work organised at Tracebit?

It’s a small, tight team - we have a standup everyday, each team member is usually responsible for delivering something reasonably large for customers and we meet every few weeks to talk about longer term plans. Between that - there’s a tonne of discussions, customer feedback and analysis, but not a huge amount of process, the team is trusted to prioritise where to spend their time.

Where is the office?

The whole team works together in an office right next to Warren Street tube station https://tfl.gov.uk/hub/stop/940gzzluwrr/warren-street-underground-station/ - there are lots of great places to grab lunch nearby.

Are you doing hybrid/remote?

‍Short answer: No, but flexible on a day to day basis.

Long answer: We are set on building the company on a foundation of an office based culture. We are a very early stage company and think that we’ll build the best company at the fastest pace we can whilst also having a lot of fun by physically working together 5 days a week. On a case by case basis (e.g. leaving early for a holiday, staying home for a builder, working remote for a few days to visit family, etc. etc.) we’re very reasonable and flexible. We respect that this is not for everyone.

‍What are the working hours like?

‍We think 9am-6pm will bring a great cadence to work. As a Founding Engineer there will definitely be times yo

source_jobs.title: Founding Engineer - Relocate to the UK
source_jobs.description:
WHY WE'RE HIRING



London's tech scene is thriving, and we're building something special here. We're looking for talented engineers from the US who are excited about the opportunity to work in one of Europe's most vibrant tech hubs, with the career growth that comes from being an early employee at a fast-growing startup.

Our product helps security teams quickly and accurately detect intrusions in their cloud environment using canaries - decoy tripwires deployed to deceive attackers.

We're at a massive inflection point and this is a hugely exciting time to join the company:

 - We have just raised a $20m Series A https://tracebit.com/blog/series-a, led by FirstMark and joined by Accel, MMC Ventures, Tapestry VC and CCL.

 - We are growing very quickly (we doubled ARR last quarter) and have signed some massive clients, including Riot Games, Synthesia, Docker, Coveo and Snyk, but also some others we can't disclose.

 - We are one of the most exciting startups to be part of in the UK, have seen some great feedback from the market and are ready for explosive growth.

 - Regularly featured on top startup lists from industry veterans...
   
   - Creandum's Euro Seed top 50 list https://euroseed50.com/, Sifted's 2025 London Startups To Watch https://sifted.eu/articles/london-based-startups-to-watch, Notions Cloud Top 100 https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/613b85712c9672dcafb125ed/67ee997d510af7304efdaecc_NOTION_cloud_challengers_report_2025_V18.pdf, AlbionVC's NHI Breakdown https://albion.vc/spotlight/perspectives/a-new-era-of-secure-identity-management/, MMCs Proactive Security Analysis https://mmc.vc/research/proactive-security-bringing-the-attackers-perspective/, Accel's Euroscape Top Startups 2024 https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6643a08d305ab77f8c7566b6/670f22a19ea69a94f9710c1a_16%20October%20-%20Accel%202024%20Euroscape.pdf, etc.

 - Our research https://www.techradar.com/pro/security/google-gemini-security-flaw-could-have-let-anyone-access-systems-or-run-code has recently helped fix a P1 security flaw in Google's Gemini CLI.

 - We're Seed stage, and have grown the company from 2 people 18 months ago to 18 today, with plans to triple this in the coming year.



We're solving real problems for discerning organisations, our stack is simple and powerful: it's enabling us to process billions of events a week while delivering every day. We're using a lot of what you would expect (AWS, IaC, CD) but also a few things you probably wouldn't!



Thinking of moving to the UK? We can sponsor visas and provide a £5,000 tax free relocation package to help with your move to London. We're also happy to provide guidance on finding accommodation, setting up in the UK, and making your transition as smooth as possible.




WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - Cares deeply about producing high quality work and is ready to dig into the details but is savvy in making the correct tradeoffs on pace vs. quality.

 - Has spent at least a few years building software at some degree of scale and/or criticality.

 - Ideally at a Product focused company and/or working with at least 1 of the public clouds (AWS, Azure, GCP, etc.)

 - Is excited by the pace and rate of change that is inevitable in any successful, early stage startup.

 - Gets their energy from getting things done and in the hands of customers but is also here to have fun along the way!

If you don't fit this bill exactly but think you could make a difference here - please, apply!




ABOUT THE ROLE

Reporting to Niall https://www.linkedin.com/in/niall-gallagher/, our Engineering Lead, and with significant exposure to our CTO and Co-Founder, Sam https://www.linkedin.com/in/sam-j-cox/, you’ll join a team of other awesome engineers looking to make their mark on the world.

This includes:

 - Working face to face with both founders, the whole engineering team and our customers and prospects to build a delightful product that solves real problems.

 - Working across the stack, mostly in C# on .NET Core 10

source_jobs.title: Founding Engineer - Early Careers
source_jobs.description:
Our product helps security teams quickly and accurately detect intrusions in their cloud environment using canaries - decoy tripwires deployed to deceive attackers.

We're at a massive inflection point and this is a hugely exciting time to join the company:

 - We've just raised a $20m Series A https://tracebit.com/blog/series-a led by FirstMark with Accel, MMC, Tapestry and CCL.

 - Our research https://www.techradar.com/pro/security/google-gemini-security-flaw-could-have-let-anyone-access-systems-or-run-code recently helped fix a P1 security flaw in Google's Gemini CLI.

We’re looking for someone who…

 - Is genuinely interested in technology and cyber security, and keen to build a career in it.

 - Has a strong academic foundation - an undergraduate or/and master's degree, ideally in a STEM subject like computer science, engineering, maths, physics… and has demonstrated real academic excellence.

 - Has strong engineering fundamentals and a real appetite to learn - can write clean, correct code in a known language, and is genuinely curious about how things work under the hood.

 - Has built things they're proud of - side projects, open source, hackathons… And is excited by the pace and rate of change that is inevitable in any successful, early stage startup.

 - Gets their energy from getting things done and in the hands of customers but is also here to have fun along the way!
